Power BI helps weekly reporting but export cleanup is still manual

Jamie, BI Analyst

Role: BI Analyst

Company Size: 201-500 employees

Industry: Retail

Use Case: monthly reporting and board reporting

Problems Solved: dashboard trust, numbers look wrong, reconcile dashboard with source data

Benefits: faster executive summary prep

Verified Reviewer

Rating 4/5

We still export to Excel every week because business users do not trust the dashboard. Monthly reporting takes too long and we need to reconcile KPI changes before stakeholder review.
